overall.description: A first-person walk through a rain-slicked cyberpunk city at night, featuring towering skyscrapers covered in holographic advertisements and neon signage. The camera moves from a narrow street between buildings, across an intersection, and into a plaza area with a multi-story parking structure, encountering pedestrians and vehicles along the way. The footage is clearly from a high-quality game engine with cinematic lighting and detailed futuristic architecture.

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a view looking up at a massive neon-lit tower in a narrow cyberpunk street. The camera walks forward between towering buildings, passing a parked medical ambulance on the left and a food cart on the right. The street is wet and reflective, with an elevated walkway bridge visible overhead connecting the buildings.

segments.scene_description: The camera moves from the narrow street into a more open intersection area, approaching a yellow striped crosswalk. A construction truck drives across the intersection while pedestrians cross the street. The elevated walkway remains visible in the distance, and a large digital billboard advertising All Night Every Night dominates the right side of the view.

segments.scene_description: Having crossed the street, the scene opens into a wide plaza with distinctive red pavement marked with white Japanese text. The camera walks past benches where people are sitting and yellow vending machines. The multi-story parking garage becomes visible on the left, while the large digital billboard recedes into the distance on the right.

segments.scene_description: The final segment focuses on the massive multi-story parking garage that now dominates the center of the view. The camera walks past the structure while looking up at vertical holographic billboards, including one displaying a boxing advertisement. People are seen sitting on benches near a glass building entrance on the right, and the plaza extends further into the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a claustrophobic, neon-lit alleyway into a wide, bustling urban intersection. It begins by looking up at a massive tower while moving forward through a narrow street, passing a parked medical ambulance and a food cart on rain-slicked, reflective pavement. As the camera advances beneath an elevated walkway bridge, the tight corridor opens up into a broader city crossing. The scene then expands to reveal a yellow striped crosswalk where a construction truck and pedestrians navigate the space, while a dominant digital billboard advertising All Night Every Night comes into full view on the right.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a wide, open plaza into the towering shadow of a massive parking structure. It begins by crossing onto red pavement marked with white Japanese text, gliding past yellow vending machines and people resting on benches. As the camera advances, the distant digital billboards recede to the right while the multi-story parking garage gradually looms larger on the left. The scene then shifts to focus entirely on the concrete monolith of the garage, with the camera tilting upward to reveal vertical holographic billboards and a boxing advertisement. Finally, the view expands to show the plaza stretching into the distance, passing a glass building entrance where more pedestrians are gathered.
